creator: dch@freebsd.org
text:
thanks for your PR Pol!

I'm reasonably sure this is a duplicate of 196754, if not let me know and we can re-open this. 

In the interim, you can use www/iridium which is another chromium-based browser which doesn't crash with 2FA enabled. www/firefox doesn't either.

*** This bug has been marked as a duplicate of bug 196754 ***
